query: Hmm the utility room feels really dry, towels crackle when I fold them and my hands feel a bit tight. The living room is the opposite, muggy and sticky, sitting there makes me restless and a little clammy.

The user reports the living room feels muggy and sticky, suggesting high humidity. I need to check the current humidity level in the living room to confirm this.
